narrative:
Elyria municipal court district has 85,564 registered voters, with 57.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.8 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +1.2% D−R vs +3.5% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
